creator: duerrd561@gmail.com
text: FWIW, the upgrade to 12.4-RELEASE negatively affected all of my igb network configurations that had worked previously on 12.2-STABLE. In one case, removing the use of VLANs worked around this underlying issue -- thankfully I had enough individual igb ports to do so. But in this case, I can't do this because I only have 2 ports to work with.
